sentences.arabic: أَرَدْتُ أَنْ أَسْتَأْجِرَ سَيَّارَةً لِأَتَجَوَّلَ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ بِحُرِّيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Htio sam iznajmiti auto kako bih se slobodno kretao po gradu.
sentences.translationEn: I wanted to rent a car so I could move freely around the city.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ تَأْجِيرِ السَّيَّارَاتِ وَسَأَلْتُ عَنِ الْأَسْعَارِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam u agenciju za iznajmljivanje automobila i pitao o cijenama.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the car rental office and asked about prices.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْمُوَظَّفُ إِنَّ السَّعْرَ يَوْمِيٌّ وَيَشْمَلُ التَّأْمِينَ.
sentences.translation: Službenik je rekao da je cijena dnevna i uključuje osiguranje.
sentences.translationEn: The employee said the rate is daily and includes insurance.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنِّي جَوَازَ سَفَرِي وَرُخْصَةَ الْقِيَادَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zatražio je moj pasoš i vozačku dozvolu.
sentences.translationEn: He asked for my passport and driving licence.

sentences.translation: Potpisao sam ugovor i preuzeo ključeve auta.
sentences.translationEn: I signed the contract and received the car keys.
